visual: Front leg bent with knee over the ankle, rear leg straight with foot angled outward, roughly 70% of weight on the front leg.
motion_description: From a wide stance, the left arm extends laterally out to the side and sweeps upwards in a large, slow arc over the head. The torso and waist pivot to the left as the left hand descends across the front of the body in a continuous, smooth motion. During this rotation, the majority of weight settles onto the bent left leg with the knee positioned over the ankle, while the right leg remains straight and anchored behind with the foot angled slightly outward.
